§6Dineutronium Anvil§f is the §bultimate crafting station§f for §bDNT materials§f.

§ePosition:§f The §afinal tier§f of anvils - nothing beyond this.

§eCapabilities:§f
• Works with §bDineutronium§f directly
• Required for §bDNT Nanosuit§f crafting
• Handles all material types

§eRequirements:§f
• Made from DNT components
• Represents peak of anvil progression

§aTip:§f This is it - the ultimate anvil for the ultimate armor.
